name: Mount Etna
eruptionHistory: One of the world's most active volcanoes with nearly continuous eruption for the past 3,500 years. Major eruptions in 1669, 1928, 1991-93, and frequent summit activity.
description: Mount Etna is Europe's tallest and most active volcano. Its near-constant eruptions have been documented since ancient times, making it one of the best-studied volcanoes in the world.
